name: Chinese Country Ribs
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Cornstarch dissolved in 1 tablespoon Cold water
4 pounds Country ribs (cut into individual ribs)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-1/2 quart slow cooker, combine ketchup, honey, vinegar, soy sauce, five-spice powder, onion, ginger, and garlic.
2. Preheat the broiler on a broiler rack positioned 6 inches from the heat source.
3. Broil the ribs, turning once, until browned (about 10 minutes).
4. Transfer the browned ribs to the slow cooker. Stir to coat with the sauce.
5. Cover and slow cook at 200°F (low) for 5-6 hours.
6. Remove the ribs from the slow cooker and transfer to a platter. Cover with aluminum foil to keep warm.
7. Skim any fat from the surface of the sauce.
8. In a medium saucepan, bring the sauce to a simmer over medium heat.
9. Cook until reduced to about 1 cup (6-8 minutes).
10. Stir in the cornstarch mixture and cook just until thickened.
11. Pour the sauce over the ribs and serve immediately with hot cooked rice.
